2026-04-17T09:30:35.8203447Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-17T09:30:35.8203863Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-17T09:30:35.8204209Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-17T09:30:35.8204500Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-17T09:30:35.8204745Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-17T09:30:35.8204936Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-17T09:30:35.8205076Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-17T09:30:35.8205231Z [36;1m[0m
